use_cases: Building interactive spreadsheet-like interfaces for project management tools
Creating data entry grids for inventory or tracking systems
Implementing calculator or formula-based tools in web applications
Displaying and editing tabular data with user interactivity
Adding spreadsheet functionality to productivity or collaboration apps
ai_summary: A functional spreadsheet grid component with cell selection, editing, and formula support. Features click-to-select and double-click-to-edit interactions for cells arranged in a configurable row/column layout. Implements Excel-style column lettering (A-Z, AA, AB) and maintains cell state management for data manipulation.
